author: Ammer Ayach
name: Session 04 Delta 1: GPTQ-lite Clip Search
blurb: Single delta on Session 03 anchor: replace fixed row-max int6 quantization with GPTQ-lite 5-percentile MSE clip search. Training identical to anchor. 11L 512d 3x MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, XSA-4, partial RoPE 16/64 with NTK scaling, LN scale, EMA 0.997, mixed int6+zstd, stride-64 sliding eval.
